Package org.unlaxer.tramli

Class FlowInstance<S extends Enum<S> & FlowState>

java.lang.Object
org.unlaxer.tramli.FlowInstance<S>
public final class FlowInstance<S extends Enum<S> & FlowState> extends Object
Runtime state of a flow execution.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructor
    Description

    Description
    FlowInstance<?>
    activeSubFlow()
    Active sub-flow instance, or null if not in a sub-flow.

    Data types currently available in context (based on data-flow graph for current state).

  • Constructor Details

    • FlowInstance

      public FlowInstance(String id, String sessionId, FlowDefinition<S> definition, FlowContext context, S currentState, Instant expiresAt)

  • Method Details

    • restore

      public static <S extends Enum<S> & FlowState> FlowInstance<S> restore(String id, String sessionId, FlowDefinition<S> definition, FlowContext context, S currentState, Instant createdAt, Instant expiresAt, int guardFailureCount, int version, String exitState)
      Restore a FlowInstance from persisted state. Used by FlowStore implementations to reconstruct instances loaded from storage.
      Parameters:
      createdAt - the original creation timestamp (not Instant.now())
      exitState - null if the flow is still active

    • id

      public String id()

    • sessionId

      public String sessionId()

    • definition

      public FlowDefinition<S> definition()

    • context

      public FlowContext context()

    • currentState

      public S currentState()

    • guardFailureCount

      public int guardFailureCount()

    • guardFailureCount

      public int guardFailureCount(String guardName)
      Guard failure count for a specific guard (by name).

    • version

      public int version()

    • createdAt

      public Instant createdAt()

    • expiresAt

      public Instant expiresAt()

    • exitState

      public String exitState()

    • isCompleted

      public boolean isCompleted()

    • activeSubFlow

      public FlowInstance<?> activeSubFlow()
      Active sub-flow instance, or null if not in a sub-flow.

    • lastError

      public String lastError()
      Last error message (set when a processor throws and error transition fires).

    • stateEnteredAt

      public Instant stateEnteredAt()
      When the current state was entered. Used for per-state timeout.

    • statePath

      public List<String> statePath()
      State path from root to deepest active sub-flow. E.g. ["PAYMENT", "CONFIRM"].

    • statePathString

      public String statePathString()
      State path as a slash-separated string. E.g. "PAYMENT/CONFIRM".

    • availableData

      public Set<Class<?>> availableData()
      Data types currently available in context (based on data-flow graph for current state).

    • missingFor

      public Set<Class<?>> missingFor()
      Data types that the next transition requires but are not yet in context.

    • waitingFor

      public Set<Class<?>> waitingFor()
      Types required by the next external transition (including in active sub-flows). Empty if not waiting at an external transition.

    • withVersion

      public FlowInstance<S> withVersion(int newVersion)
      Return a copy with the given version. For FlowStore implementations that need to update the version after save (e.g., optimistic locking).
